ValidationRule.description: Prevent user from changing ownership of a contact if not creator of contact
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( ContactOwner__c ), ISBLANK( Proposed_Contact_Owner__c )=true, NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000s3v6'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UE'), NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e58000000z6UC'), NOT(ISCHANGED(Approval_Status__c)),!$User.BypassValidationRules__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to direct change contact owner. To do so, please fill in "Proposed Contact Owner" field
